case_title: REGINALD JAMES UPSHAW VS. SEF SOLEI, LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SIGNED SERVED MAR-06-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SEF SOLEI, LLC DBA ONQUARD INSURANCE SERVICES, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UPSHAW, REGINALD JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEF SOLEI, LLC DBA ONQUARD INSURANCE SERVICES, LLC $65.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $65.00, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $65.00, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
